history.qwen_observation: The upgrade_sb_2_7 step failed because SpringFox dependencies are missing/incompatible after the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade recipe modified the POM, causing 'package springfox.documentation.builders does not exist'.
history.qwen_rationale: SpringFox is abandoned and breaks with Spring Boot 2.6+. Following the observation library, I will insert the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration step before the Spring Boot upgrades to replace SpringFox with springdoc-openapi, ensuring the build compiles cleanly before and during the SB 2.7 and SB 3.3 transitions.

history.qwen_observation: SpringFoxToSpringDoc at JDK 11 removed dependencies but left configuration classes intact, causing compilation failure; moving it to JDK 17 before SB 3.3 upgrade aligns with observation library guidance.
history.qwen_rationale: The observation library explicitly recommends running SpringFoxToSpringDoc at JDK 17 immediately before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade. This ensures the project compiles on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 2.7 first, then cleanly migrates SpringFox to SpringDoc before the javax->jakarta and SB3 transition, avoiding the unresolved package errors seen at JDK 11.

history.qwen_observation: SpringFox dependencies were removed or became incompatible during the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade, causing compilation failures for missing springfox.documentation.* packages.
history.qwen_rationale: Moving the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration step to run immediately after the Lombok bump (under JDK 11) ensures all SpringFox references are replaced with SpringDoc equivalents before the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade recipe executes. This prevents the missing package errors and allows the subsequent SB 2.7 and SB 3.3 upgrades to proceed cleanly.

history.qwen_observation: The SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration recipe failed post-recipe compilation at JDK 11 because it removed SpringFox dependencies but left stale imports in SpringFoxConfiguration.java, and the subsequent upgrade_sb_2_7 step is known to break with SpringFox present.
history.qwen_rationale: Placing the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration immediately after lombok_safe_bump at JDK 11 ensures SpringFox is fully replaced by SpringDoc before any Spring Boot version bumps. This prevents the known incompatibility between SpringFox and Spring Boot 2.6+ (triggered by upgrade_sb_2_7) and allows the SB 2.7 -> 3.3 transition to proceed cleanly under the correct JDK versions.
